title: Cyber Security Intern
description: Conducted extensive research on vulnerability categories relevant to different business sectors, with a focus on the OWASP top 10 most common vulnerabilities.
Analyzed workplace trends of vulnerabilities, evaluating their potential impact on businesses and developing effective countermeasures.

Collaborated with InfraGuard to build alerting RSS streams within Swan Island's TX360 security alerting software, enabling companies to receive timely cybersecurity news updates and enhance their situational awareness.
Contributed to the development of actionable cybersecurity solutions for organizations by providing in-depth research and critical analysis focused on proactive threat response.

title: Technical Support Engineer
description: Provided technical support for customers with over 96% satisfaction rating while handling tier 1 support tickets and effectively communicating with unhappy customers to solve complex problems.
Specialized in identifying and fixing vulnerability-related bugs in security training content written in 64 different programming languages. Totalling over 400 bugs fixed in under 2 years.

Developed a bug fixing program that reduced the average resolution time per bug from 1 hour to just 15 minutes, resulting in a 60% increase of the number of bugs fixed over a 1 year period of its use.
Led a team of two professionals in the U.S. division, providing guidance, training, and fostering a collaborative work environment.

Successfully led weekly SSO, LMS, API troubleshooting and setup calls for large organizations with up to 30,000 platform users, while ensuring seamless integration and satisfaction for the client’s needs.
